title: Backfill ProjectUpdater E/I records and make Emergence capture mandatory per-project
description: Operator identified a real gap: the Emergence/Insight (E/I) system was never used during the ProjectUpdater build (TASK-123/124/125) despite emergence/README.md existing and defining project-level insights/ideas/experiments/synthesis folders. Operator directive: backfill proper insight/idea records for ProjectUpdater now, and make Emergence capture mandatory for every project going forward, enforced through MAP, not just documented as a suggestion. Scope: (1) create Projects/ProjectUpdater/{insights,ideas,experiments,synthesis} folders and backfill real INS/IDEA records for what was actually learned during the build (Playwright/Chromium install workaround, RISK-0001 export/import mitigation idea, the pattern of reviewers catching completeness gaps). (2) Update MAP_System/PROJECT_BOOTSTRAPPING_SYSTEM.md and NEW_PROJECT_WIZARD.md to require emergence folder creation at bootstrap and ongoing capture during work, not just at project start. (3) Update MAP_System/CHANGE_CONTROL_SYSTEM.md's release-record convention and MAP_System/scripts/release_task.py's REQUIRED_ITEMS to add a mandatory 'Emergence capture considered' checklist line, so release_task.py mechanically blocks release without it - same enforcement mechanism as the existing 3 required checklist items. (4) Record a POLICY-class decision in shared/decisions.md per operator's direct instruction (command-center approval satisfied by the instruction itself, per DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md).
acceptance_criteria: Projects/ProjectUpdater has real INS/IDEA records for what was learned during TASK-123-125, using map_emergence.py
PROJECT_BOOTSTRAPPING_SYSTEM.md and NEW_PROJECT_WIZARD.md require emergence folder creation at bootstrap and ongoing capture as work proceeds, not just at project start
release_task.py mechanically requires an 'Emergence capture considered' checklist line before release, same enforcement as existing 3 required items, with a passing focused test
shared/decisions.md records this as a POLICY-class decision
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the work
